theme.archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast mixed with Performance Pro
theme.description: Inspired by Linear's strict hierarchy and Power BI's data density. Clean, authoritative, and data-driven.

rules: No generic sans (Inter, Roboto) for headings.
Headlines > 32px must use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Overlines/Labels must be uppercase, tiny, with tracking-[0.2em].
Line height: tight for headers (leading-none), loose for body (leading-relaxed).
Never use pure #000000 or #808080. Always tint neutrals slightly.
Ensure text meets APCA/WCAG contrast ratios.
Always explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-blue-600 hover:text-white).
No teal green/blue for dashboards (FORBIDDEN_COLOR: #1B93A4).

layouts.spacing_system: Strict 4px/8px base unit. Generous spacing (p-8 to p-12) between sections.

rules: Summary cards: col-span-1
Primary Data/Main charts: col-span-2 or col-span-3
Every pixel utilized, no jagged bottoms. Use h-full.

surfaces: Headers: Use Crystal Glass (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 or bg-black/60) if scrolling, or Solid if fixed.
CRITICAL: DO NOT use complete `transparent` background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it. Example: Dropdown with transparent background.
Cards: Smooth/Subtle roundness, max 8px border-radius. Avoid over-shadowing. In light mode, flat background, 1px subtle border.

rules: Micro-interactions for all hover states (buttons, cards, rows).
Avoid universal transitions (no 'transition-all'). Target specific properties (e.g., 'transition-colors transition-transform duration-200').
Dashboards need minimal animation (staggered list entrance, subtle tooltips).

components.library: shadcn/ui customized + standard HTML/Tailwind for Landing.
rules: Do NOT use HTML for advanced interactions (use Shadcn Select, Dialog, Calendar).
Toast notifications: Use Sonner.
Charts: Use Recharts or Shadcn Chart components. Ensure color-blind friendly palettes.
Table: TanStack Table for data heavy views.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
Convention: kebab-case, role-based (e.g., data-testid='upload-csv-button').
Respect prefers-reduced-motion.

hero_background.description: Abstract data visualization network lines for tech background

dashboard_preview.description: Modern analytics dashboard on laptop screen

about_team.description: Modern business team meeting, professional setting

instructions_to_main_agent: Start by setting up the theme configuration (Tailwind setup, colors, fonts).
Ensure all components are strictly written in .js/.jsx extensions, NOT .ts/.tsx.
Create the overall layout structure: Sidebar navigation + Main content area.
Implement the landing page with Custom HTML/Tailwind and Bento grid layouts.
Implement the Dashboard with Shadcn components, Recharts for Sales/Category/Region visuals, and High Density Grid.
Build the Upload view with drag-and-drop functionality and preview capabilities.
Develop the Analytics view using TanStack table (sort, filter, paginate).
Develop the AI Insights page, mock the backend generation, display sections clearly (Exec Summary, Risks, etc.).
Never use Bootstrap. Use strict Vite + React + Tailwind + Lucide Icons stack.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Create distinctive frontends that surprise and delight, avoiding generic 'AI slop' aesthetics.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. DO NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: left; }).
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use modern button styles (pill-shaped or sharp) with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
GENERAL UI UX DESIGN GUIDELINES: Prioritize typography and whitespace. Good design feels spacious.
Avoid unnecessary dividers. Use space instead of lines to group elements.
Align elements logically. Avoid jagged layouts.
Make click targets large enough (min 44x44px for touch).
